gold_lean:
/-- Fireball: 8d6 Fire, DEX save for half, 18m range, 4m radius AoE -/
axiom fireball_damage (gs : GameState) (target : EntityId)
    (h_exists : (gs.getEntity target).isSome) :
    let dmg := DamageRoll.mk ⟨8, 6, 0⟩ .fire
    ∃ gs', step gs (.takeDamage target [dmg]) = some gs' ∧
    (gs'.getEntity target).get!.hp ≤ (gs.getEntity target).get!.hp
